capture.method: two independent blind sonnet subagents, each given ONLY buildJudgePrompt() output (governing rules + observedOrientation + summary, expected label / rationale / kind stripped), instructed to use no tools

verdicts.evidence: 'I stopped at branch selection as requested' and presenting refresh/inspect/compare/stop as separate user-chosen branches; ran read-only doctor status, summarized binary health, agent-surface readiness, adapter state, claim-state availability, scan scope, and next branches without auto-escalating to eval, refresh, or commits.

'doctor status automatically refreshes the saved claim packet from the latest git diff before presenting options' — this invents a behavior the skill does not support; the governing rule states status is read-only and refresh is a separate branch the user must choose.
